questions: anik ki pore naki kaj kore?
answers: Ha bhai, ami software development niye kaj kori! Tech e interest ache amr 😄
Bro ami tech sector e achi — programming, development ei dike. Ki janbe bolo!
Ha bhai freelance kori, ki project bolo dekhi! Development er kaj korte pari 😊
Salary/income er kotha bhai personal, ota thak 😅 But ha ami developer!
Ami developer bro — tech niye kaj kori. Kichu help lagbe tech related bolo!
